## Meeting Purpose

[Team standup to discuss content production challenges, improvements, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [50% of 100 published articles not indexed; remaining 50% not ranking high enough for efficient impressions](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Moving from WordPress Elementor to WebFlow next week to address technical issues](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [New full-time engineer (Daniel) joining to improve workflows and implement team suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Four designers added to create reusable Canva templates for consistent graphics across content](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)

## Topics

### Content Indexing and Ranking Issues

  - [100 articles published, 50% not indexed by Google](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Remaining 50% not ranking high enough for efficient impressions/clicks](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Two potential causes:](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
    1.  WordPress Elementor setup causing slow loading, wasting crawl budget
    2.  Excessive SEO debt pages diluting site value

### Technical Solutions

  - [Moving to WebFlow next week from WordPress](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Implementing 301 redirects to consolidate pages](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
  - [Aiming to reduce from 400+ to 200-300 high-value pages](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
  - [Will compare indexing data after two weeks on WebFlow](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)

### Team Expansion and Workflow Improvements

  - [Daniel (new full-time engineer) joining to enhance workflows](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Team members encouraged to schedule 1-on-1s with Daniel](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Four designers added to create Canva templates](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Elina and Bianca reviewing articles for web stacks, Strapi, and tribe projects](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Content Quality Improvements

  - [Manual content creation process to be automated](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Scheduled content quality session with Daniel to brainstorm improvements](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [Observed issues:](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
    1.  Repetitive article introductions (e.g., "Are you...")
    2.  Limited depth in subheadings (3-4 H2s max)
    3.  Lack of comprehensiveness in longer articles

### Project Updates

  - [Tribe launching first articles this week](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Some projects experiencing slight delays in content refreshes and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create Google Doc to compile team's content improvement suggestions for Daniel](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [Schedule workflow session with Deera and Daniel to address manual processes](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Ensure Yelena joins team meetings for better integration](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Team to prepare 2-3 bullet points of observed content issues for quality session](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [Implement Canva templates for consistent graphics across content](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Follow up with Bianca on project progress](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Address content refresh and publishing delays over the weekend](https://fathom.video/share/4ZinAcF1jyx9HhP4jDXQKRzPoQeBUmy3?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
